name: KAGEM Mining Ltd
description: KAGEM Mining is the world's largest single emerald mine, located in Lufwanyama District on the Copperbelt. IDC holds 75% with Gemfields Group holding 25%. KAGEM produces high-quality Zambian emeralds.

name: ZESCO Limited
description: ZESCO is Zambia's national power utility responsible for generation, transmission, and distribution of electricity. IDC holds shares on behalf of the Government of Zambia.

name: Zambia National Commercial Bank Plc (ZANACO)
description: ZANACO is Zambia's largest commercial bank by branch network with over 70 branches nationwide. IDC holds 25% with Rabobank and other shareholders holding the remainder.

name: Zambia Telecommunications Company Ltd (ZAMTEL)
description: ZAMTEL is Zambia's national telecommunications company providing fixed-line, mobile, and internet services. IDC holds 100% on behalf of the Government of Zambia.

name: Zambia Railways Limited
description: Zambia Railways operates the national rail network covering 2,157 km connecting Livingstone to the Copperbelt and the Democratic Republic of Congo border.

name: Zambeef Products Plc
description: Zambeef is Zambia's largest agribusiness and food processing company, listed on the Lusaka Securities Exchange and AIM London. IDC holds 18% strategic stake.

name: Mopani Copper Mines Plc
description: Mopani Copper Mines operates the Mufulira and Nkana copper mines. IDC holds a minority stake alongside ZCCM-IH (49%) and IRH/Delta Mining (51%).

name: Indeni Petroleum Refinery Company Ltd
description: Indeni Petroleum Refinery is Zambia's only oil refinery, located in Ndola. It processes crude oil from the TAZAMA pipeline and supplies petroleum products to the Zambian market.
